---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: "Propose a world-class enhancement for Termim."
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []

---

## 🏁 The Vision
What is the "Industry-Grade" enhancement you are proposing?

## 🛠️ The Problem
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe. (Ex: I'm always frustrated when [...] )

## 💡 The Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 📊 Context & Use Cases
How will this help the developer community? Provide clear examples or workflows.

## ⚖️ Alternatives
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Thank you for helping evolve Termim into the future!** 🚀🏎️🔥
